capacity.why: header record tap_header_2x08_254 provides 8 channel(s); a board/firmware family carries every allocated channel

header.ground: interleaved return: one ground pin adjacent to every signal pin (ribbon-cable GS pairing)
header.keying: shrouded polarizing notch + pin-1 corner marking
header.ordering: channel N on odd pin 2N+1 (1,3,..,15); ground on every even pin (2,4,..,16)
header.reference: Wurth Elektronik WR-BHD 2.54mm shrouded box header series drawing (16-pin, 61201621621); ground-interleave/keying assignment is this repo's DFT taxonomy (WO-125, charter 40 sec. 4)

taps.why: bring-up: 'is the USB pair even toggling?' is the first question when the jig will not enumerate (claim usb_diff_z0 names this net)
